title: Free cooking gas cylinders
description: Provide 3 free cooking gas cylinders annually to all BPL families during Ugadi, Ganesh Chaturthi and Deepavali.

title: Atal Aahara Kendra
description: Set up an Atal Aahara Kendra in every ward of every municipal corporation to provide affordable, quality and healthy food.

title: Poshane scheme
description: Provide every BPL household half litre Nandini milk every day and 5 kg Shri Anna/Siri Dhanya through monthly ration kits.

title: Sarvarigu Suru Yojane
description: Identify and distribute 10 lakh housing sites across the state to siteless and homeless beneficiaries.

title: Onake Obavva Samajika Nyaya Nidhi
description: Provide a matching deposit up to Rs.10,000 on 5-year fixed deposits made by women of SC/ST households.

title: Karnataka Residents Welfare Consultative Committee
description: Improve ease of living for apartment dwellers in Bengaluru through a residents welfare committee and grievance reforms.

title: Visvesvaraya Vidya Yojane
description: Partner with eminent institutions and individuals to upgrade government schools to top-class standards.

title: Samanvaya Yojane
description: Drive collaboration between SMEs and ITIs to generate employment for talented young professionals.

title: Mission Swasthya Karnataka
description: Strengthen public healthcare by establishing one Namma Clinic with diagnostic facilities in every municipal ward and providing annual master health check-ups for senior citizens.

title: Bengaluru Global Hub of Digital Innovation
description: Develop Bengaluru for the next generation through a state capital region and technology-led city development program around ease of life and transport networks.

title: Electric vehicle hub
description: Transform Karnataka into a premier hub of electric vehicles through charging stations, startups and bus electrification.

title: K-Agri Fund
description: Set up a Rs.30,000 crore K-Agri Fund for cold storage, processing, APMCs and agro-industry clusters.

title: Gruha Jyothi
description: Provide 200 units of free electricity to all houses.

title: Gruha Lakshmi
description: Provide Rs.2,000 every month to each and every woman head of the family.

title: Anna Bhagya
description: Provide 10 kg rice or food grains of choice every month to every person in BPL families.

title: Yuvanidhi
description: Provide unemployment support for unemployed graduates and diploma holders.

title: Shakti free bus travel
description: Provide free travel to all women throughout the state in regular KSRTC and BMTC buses.

title: Local body elections timeline
description: Put in place a strict timeline to ensure all local body elections are held regularly.

title: Public service delivery
description: Strengthen SAKALA Act to ensure timely delivery of services to citizens within stipulated time limits.

title: Transparent public works tenders
description: Abolish corruption in public works and create transparent tender systems in PWD, rural development, irrigation, urban development and power sectors.

title: Time-bound civic works
description: Ensure works begin within 90 days of work order and contractors complete bills within contractual timelines.

title: Police recruitment and modernization
description: Fill police vacancies, increase women police recruitment and modernize child-friendly police stations.

title: Mahatma Gandhi Gram Swaraj Scheme
description: Invest Rs.50 thousand crore over five years to improve facilities in villages including drinking water, sanitation, education, health and roads.

title: Bengaluru TenderSURE expansion
description: Extend Bengaluru’s TenderSURE road model to cities with population above 10 lakh.

title: Slum regularisation and housing
description: Construct apartments with facilities and regularise slums with title deeds under Ashraya Vasathi Samuchhaya.

title: Garbage clearance projects
description: Prepare a master plan and implement garbage clearance projects to recycle it as energy, manure and other products.

title: Zero corruption
description: Implement anti-corruption governance and improve accountability of public services.

title: 300 units free electricity
description: Provide 300 units of free electricity.

title: Employment stipend
description: Provide Rs.3,000 unemployment stipend for youth.

title: Farmers loan waiver
description: Provide farmers' loan waiver support.

title: Minimum support price
description: Support minimum support price for farmers.

title: Free quality education
description: Provide free quality education.

title: Free quality healthcare
description: Provide free quality healthcare.

title: Permanent jobs to contract employees
description: Provide permanent jobs to contract employees.

title: Decentralised local body budget
description: Allocate Rs.3,000 per resident per year to local bodies for streets, sanitation and welfare needs.

title: Regional economic development fund
description: Create a regional economic development plan and provide annual grants to districts for regional strategy and development.

title: Dense road network and bus quality
description: Construct a dense road network and improve quality of bus services for regional transport.

title: Janata Jaladhare
description: Implement pending comprehensive irrigation projects and supply clean drinking water across the state.

title: Free cycles for high school students
description: Distribute free bicycles to 6.8 lakh high-school students.

title: Electric mopeds for girl students
description: Distribute electric mopeds to 60,000 economically weaker girl students in government first-grade colleges.

title: Free higher education for poor students
description: Provide free admission and education for poor students in degree, engineering and medical colleges.

title: Mathrushree support
description: Provide Rs.6,000 allowance for six months to meet needs of pregnant mothers.

title: Waiver of self-help group loans
description: Waive loans of Stree Shakti self-help groups.

title: Widow pension increase
description: Increase widow pension from Rs.900 to Rs.2,500.

title: Five free LPG cylinders
description: Provide five cooking gas cylinders free per year.

title: Raitha Bandhu support
description: Provide Rs.2,000 per month to agricultural labour families and Rs.10,000 per acre annually for seeds and fertilisers.

title: Auto driver monthly support
description: Provide Rs.2,000 monthly assistance to every auto driver in the state.

title: Senior citizen pension increase
description: Increase pension for eligible senior citizens below poverty line from Rs.1,200 to Rs.5,000.

title: Rare disease relief
description: Provide special relief up to Rs.25 lakh from the Chief Minister's Relief Fund within 24 hours for patients with rare diseases.
